# libre-mcp

> A stdio MCP server for controlling LibreOffice (Writer & Calc) over UNO.
> Runs LibreOffice headless and drives it via PyUNO; exposes document, writer,
> and calc tools to MCP clients like Claude Code.

## Docs

- [Install](https://libre-mcp.krondor.org/docs/install/): prerequisites and install paths
- [Quickstart](https://libre-mcp.krondor.org/docs/quickstart/): first document, create/edit/export flow
- [Tools](https://libre-mcp.krondor.org/docs/tools/): full tool surface (document, writer, calc)
- [Architecture](https://libre-mcp.krondor.org/docs/architecture/): two-process design, named-pipe isolation

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/krondor-corp/libre-mcp)
